# tfe_workspace_run_task

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enforcement_level` (String) The enforcement level of the task. Valid values are `advisory` and `mandatory`.
- `task_id` (String) The id of the Run task to associate to the Workspace.
- `workspace_id` (String) The id of the workspace to associate the Run task to.

### Optional

- `stage` (String, Deprecated) The stage to run the task in. Valid values are `pre_plan`, `post_plan`, `pre_apply` and `post_apply`.
- `stages` (List of String) The stages to run the task in. Valid values are `pre_plan`, `post_plan`, `pre_apply` and `post_apply`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Service-generated identifier for the workspace task
